title: YOUNG ADULT PROGRAM - 211info
text: TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES YOUNG ADULT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A voluntary residential program for individuals struggling with significant mental health diagnoses as they transition toward independent living. Program encourages independent living and helps clients manage the balance of everyday life in conjunction with self-care. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 17-24 who need temporary guidance as they develop the skills necessary to manage their mental health needs with daily life expectations Hours: Follows school district hours with an extended calendar Email (503) 813-7760 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 813-7760 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Life Skills Education Transitional Mental Health Services Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE COMMUNITY TREATMENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH PROMOTION PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - SUBACUTE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES
